title: Short Swords Mod
description: Adds new short swords that can be craftable with a single ore, they are faster than the vanilla version but have one point less damage.
body:
# Short Swords

This mod adds new short swords that can be craftable with a single ore, they are faster than the vanilla version but have one point less damage.

A simple mod, you can craft the short version of the swords with the same ores as the vanilla version.

- Loaders
  - Forge
  - NeoForge

![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6887e0a881edf77cb2e2a5457a411429fc6227b.png)
